codex_response:
Rule: recolor every non-background cell inside each outermost object’s bounding box to that outer object’s color, while leaving background cells unchanged. The verifier in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_7d1f7ee8/verifier.py) does that by filtering for objects whose bounding boxes are not strictly contained in any other object’s box. The generator in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_7d1f7ee8/generator.py) builds separated outer rectangular frames plus nested inner frames and blocks, which matches the official family without introducing unrelated noise. Package wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_7d1f7ee8/__init__.py).

The `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint was used; it matched the official examples. `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry for this task. No new primitive was needed.
